_description: SRE Agent with defaultModelProvider: Azure OpenAI routed through an AI Citadel APIM gateway. Keyless via Foundry connection or product-key.
_prerequisites: Azure subscription with Microsoft.App RP registered
Foundry project onboarded as spoke with llm:read access contract (citadel-spoke-onboarding)

targetRGs.ask: Resource groups to monitor (comma-separated; include the Citadel hub RG)

citadelProductKey.ask: Citadel APIM product subscription key (leave blank to use JWT-only via Access Contract)

existingUamiId.ask: Existing UAMI resource ID (leave blank to create new)

existingAgentAppInsightsId.ask: Existing App Insights resource ID for agent telemetry (leave blank to create new)
